response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio perfectly matches the provided reference lyrics for the song 'Ridin' on Dreams' by hololive IDOL PROJECT. 2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON was fully utilized for transcription and translation, discarding the leftover lyrics as the video ends mid-song. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are strictly synchronized with the vocal activations. The long instrumental introduction is mostly silent, but includes visual text translation for the title card and the 'free part has ended' message to provide immediate context.

subtitles.original: 無料パートは終了いたしました！ご視聴ありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: [Text: The free part has ended! Thank you for watching!]

subtitles.original: ねえ、君がいたからだよ
subtitles.english: Hey, it's because you were there

subtitles.original: ねえ、ありがとうを何度も
subtitles.english: Hey, I want to say "thank you" over and over

subtitles.original: 今すぐに伝えたいんだ
subtitles.english: I want to tell you right now

subtitles.original: あぁ 小さな夢から

subtitles.english: To something I could never have imagined
My feelings have grown so much
No matter how many times we get lost

subtitles.original: ちょっとの不安だってさ
subtitles.english: Even a little bit of anxiety

subtitles.original: 吹き飛ばせちゃうんだよ
subtitles.english: We can blow it all away

subtitles.original: 漕いでる途中に困難もあるでしょう
subtitles.english: There will be difficulties while we're rowing
Let's turn those into strength too
